title: Simple Texture Pack
description: A texture pack with a minimalist style
body:
This is a minimalist-focused texture pack designed to purify the visual noise of the original game, resulting in cleaner, crisper block materials. 
  
  It doesn't pursue photorealistic realism, but creates a focused and comfortable game screen for you through carefully adjusted color schemes, uniform lines and flat design elements

  For the redstone system, the redstone line has energy display, the emitter and thrower have a status display, the alchemy pot has a liquid type display, and so on
  
  Without much improvement to the UI interface, you can load other UI packages
![Partial texture display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c621da879b39f5eec016dda8214d550703ffb5c.jpeg)

How to use:This is a texture pack, so you should import it into resource_packs folder.

Applicable versions:1.21---1.21.8

If you're interested in a minimalist texture pack, welcome to use it！
